_note: ACCREDITATION REGISTRY — the external research/data sources the sim is built on. This is the single harvestable sink for the planned web credits/accreditation page (a human owns that feature; this file just guarantees the data exists and stays current). WIRING: every harness that consumes an external source APPENDS its entry here — see docs/CONVENTIONS.md 'Accreditation' + the probe-processing / mechanics-doc-upkeep / scientific-method skills. Rule of thumb: if a docs/DECISIONS/open-questions/probe-data claim cites an outside URL or author, that source belongs here. Tiers per docs/CONVENTIONS.md (MEASURED is our own; the rest are external): DATAMINED / COMMUNITY / API.
_maintenance: Do NOT delete an entry when a claim it backed is superseded — accreditation is cumulative (we still used the research). Add new entries; refine 'usedFor' as usage grows. Keep 'id' stable (the web feature keys on it).

sources.name: ginmy.net
sources.author: ginmy
sources.usedFor: Frame-accurate empirical bucket-mechanics tests: enemy DEF (subtractive flat), DoT crit/core, true-damage / defense-ignore, ATK-buff vs Attack-Damage-buff placement, MG heat-up. The backbone of the damage-bucket model.

sources.name: enikk.app (SRRankings)
sources.usedFor: Top-100 solo-raid ranker team compositions — defines the supported-roster list and realistic team shapes (scripts/enikk/, /enikk-audit).

sources.name: NIKKE Synergy
sources.usedFor: Character base stats, skill coefficients, and unit metadata — the primary sync source for data/characters.json.

sources.name: nikke.gg
sources.usedFor: Damage-formula reference, weapon guide (shotgun effective range 0-25, pellet hit counts), unit FAQs, elemental/bucket rules. SG under-model investigation (2026-07-15): burst-gauge-generation page states a clip-reload SG generates up to 450 energy/shot = 45x10 pellets and 'against large bosses shotguns hit all 10 pellets consistently' near range — corroborates true near landing ~1.0 vs our counted-popup ~0.60 (docs/probe-data/sg-undermodel-investigation.md).

sources.name: Prydwen Institute
sources.usedFor: Unit guides, kit interpretation, and tier context (scripts/prydwen-fetch.sh).

sources.name: ore-game.com (verify-memo)
sources.usedFor: Measured weapon fire rates, shotgun core-hit-by-range (~6% front / 1.6% mid / 0% back), reload-limit formula, MG heat-up recovery.

sources.name: note.com — _TricK_
sources.author: _TricK_
sources.usedFor: Auto-aim reticle / accuracy study: the ~12.5px auto reticle floor and ~18-20% auto-mode accuracy loss (basis of the range-dependent core model).

sources.name: note.com — tt00771
sources.author: tt00771
sources.usedFor: MG heat-up analysis (n/nce4d6818b73c) and shotgun pellet-hit-vs-accuracy thresholds (n/n7b6204613ade).

sources.name: arca.live (NIKKE channels)
sources.usedFor: KR core-hit-vs-accuracy-stat curves, shotgun spread formulas, sticky/collision mechanics.

sources.name: namu.wiki
sources.usedFor: KR wiki cross-checks on kit text and mechanic interpretations.

sources.name: github.com/rcasdzxc/SD
sources.usedFor: Decoded shot tables (rate_of_fire, reload_start_ammo rolling reloads, ammo).

sources.name: github.com/d34d633f/nikke-einkk
sources.usedFor: Frame-accurate reference simulator — cross-validates charge/gauge/full-charge mechanics (positionBurstBonus, NikkeFullChargeMode).

sources.name: Blablalink (sg-tools) / Battle Records
sources.usedFor: Official companion stats + the in-game Battle-Records damage screen fields (per-unit totals, combat power) used to grade recordings.

sources.name: Inven / DCInside (NIKKE boards)
sources.usedFor: KR community mechanic reports and cross-checks (accuracy, core, kit edge cases).

sources.name: wiki3.jp (NIKKE)
sources.usedFor: JP wiki cross-checks on kit text and mechanics.
